'''Danaan Kerr''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After the fall of the Republic and the rise of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], Kerr gave in to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and went insane.

==Biography==
Danaan Kerr was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was accepted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By the time the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Kerr had been elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. As the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] was underway, Kerr was tracked down by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and the Emperor, but the two [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] realized that Kerr was already slipping toward the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and let him live. As with other [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], Palpatine saw their mere existence as serving the dark side, and therefore ultimately serving him as well.

After the fall of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Kerr settled on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Rannon]]. Circa [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Kerr began to [[Force sense/Legends|sense]] stirrings in the dark side and believed that Palpatine had managed to [[Transfer essence|survive]]. He then began to terrorize the people of Rannon and recruit and train new Force-sensitives in the ways of the dark side. It seemed that after his detection of the change in the dark side, Kerr's power grew, as the [[Valley of Ternaax]], where he made his home, began to become corrupted, turning to rot in his presence. Word of his depredations spread throughout the [[Bitrose sector/Legends|Bitrose]], [[Hunnoverrs sector/Legends|Hunnoverrs]] and [[Instrop sector/Legends|Instrop sectors]]. These rumors of an "insane dark magician" reached [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], who composed a file on him along with a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

==Powers and abilities==
Kerr was a very skilled individual, capable in both [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] and many [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]]. He was able to [[Control Pain|control his pain]], absorb and dissipate energy, [[Force sense/Legends|detect life]], and engage in [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]] and [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]]. In addition, he had mastered more advanced Force powers such astelekinetic kill, [[Farsight/Legends|farsight]], [[transfer Force]], and [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]].

==Behind the scenes==
Illustrator [[Mike Jackson]] based the image of Kerr on uncredited model [[Rob Deary]].<ref name="MJ">{{DeviantArt|username=steampoweredmikej|url=steampoweredmikej/art/Star-Wars-Mad-Jedi-343414415|name=[[Mike Jackson]]|text=Star Wars – Mad Jedi}}</ref>
